titleStmt.title: SII 38.297: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 297. (A.R. No. 297 of 1912.) ATTI, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, Agastīśvara temple.

summary.p: It records a gift of 12 milch cows, 10 pregnable cows (siṉai pasu), 10 heifers and a bull, by Panaṅguḍaiyāṉ Nīṟaṇindāṉ alias Sēdarāyaṉ of Panaṅguḍi in Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Āḷuḍaiyār Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiyār of Atti alias Kēraḷāntakanallūr in Perunagara-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. The priests of the temple Kāśyapaṉ Viṭaṅka Bhaṭṭaṉ Āṭkoṇḍapiḷḷai and his brother Viṭaṅka Bhaṭṭaṉ Kūttaṉ, received the gift and agreed to burn the perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu 10vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattup perunakarnāṭṭu Attiyāṉa keraḷāntakanallūril Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiyārkku
coḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭaārvaḷanāṭṭup paṉaṅkuṭiyil paṉaṅkuṭaiyāṉ niṟaṇintāṉāṉa cetarāyaṉ Iṉṉāyanāṟku tirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pālpacu 10 2m ciṉai ppacu 10m polimuṟai nāku 10m Iṣapam Oṉṟu Āka U
ru 3 10 3 Inta Uru muppattumuṉṟum Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaṉ kāśyapaṉviṭaṅkabhaṭṭaṉ Āṭkoṇṭapiḷḷaiyum Ivaṉ tampi kūttanum Ubhaiyaṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku candrādittavarai celuttakkaṭavomā
ka Ippaṭi sammatittu Ippacuvum vraṣabhamuṅ kaikkoṇṭom Ivviruvom Ippaṭikku Ivai viṭaṅkabhaṭṭaṉ Āṭkoṇṭapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai viṭaṅkabhaṭṭaṉkūttaṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 38.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
